abstract: 12 February\, 2024 \| 6:00 PM \- 8:00 PM Address: Redmond Reactor 3709 157th Ave NE, Redmond, WA 98052 Format: In person (Redmond) This will be the first ever meetup for the DeepSpeed open-source project. We will have an overview of DeepSpeed, latest features and release, and deeper dive talks on particular new/important features and use cases
event_title: [In Seattle / External Registration Required] DeepSpeed Meetup
title: DeepSpeed Meetup
